visual_identity.body_type: average build, slightly worn laborer frame
visual_identity.face: tired, emotionally burdened, realistic human features
visual_identity.hair: dark, unkempt or medium-length depending on stress state
visual_identity.key_trait: no supernatural markings or artifacts present

visual_identity.skin: partially altered, ritual-corrupted but still structured
visual_identity.armor: symmetrical cenobite plating with embedded identity pins
visual_identity.pins: black iron identity anchors embedded across body
visual_identity.lighting_rule: cold, clinical shadows with minimal amber influence
visual_identity.key_trait: identity is actively contained and stabilized

visual_identity.head: distorted crown-like cenobite formation
visual_identity.lighting_rule: amber Lantern glow = emotional truth source
visual_identity.key_trait: identity is fragmented and reassembled via Lantern exposure

visual_identity.base_form: deer-head chihuahua origin distorted into Hellhound
visual_identity.body_type: oversized hellhound relative to class standard
visual_identity.eyes: dim ember glow with emotional resonance
visual_identity.environment_rule: reacts to emotional memory spikes near Lantern

visual_identity.key_trait: emotional anchor to George narrative thread

visual_identity.expression: neutral to concerned depending on scene

rules.animal_link: Chevy → Ashmaw is single continuous entity
